data.title: WATI - Team Inbox for WhatsApp
data.description:
To sign up, click here.

WhatsApp Business marketing & engagement solution for SMBs & enterprises!
 
Scale your business on WhatsApp using WATI. 
 
WATI mobile app lets you access your WATI account on mobile devices. Enable customer support & launch WhatsApp marketing campaigns on the go. 
 
Requirements
- WATI account to access WhatsApp Business API features.
 
 
How to get started with WATI App
 
Install the WATI mobile app & enter your login credentials along with the company dashboard domain provided by WATI.
 
FEATURES
 
1. Shared Team Inbox 
Get multi-login support for WhatsApp Business with complete team inbox functionalities.
 
2. WhatsApp Broadcast
Manage and monitor WhatsApp Business broadcasts directly from the WATI App.
 
3. WhatsApp Marketing
Monitor the performance of personalized WhatsApp broadcast campaigns sent to up to 100k recipients in a single click.
 
4. Quick Reply
Quickly create & organize quick replies to boost the efficiency of the chat agents.
 
5. Contact Management
Manage your WhatsApp contacts with filters, attributes & tags.
 
Leverage the power of engagement on WhatsApp & scale your business.
 
 
Setup your WhatsApp Business account with WATI. 
Visit our website now - https://www.wati.io/
 
WATI is a Product of Clare.AI Limited and we're official business partners of WhatsApp Business APIs.

data.summary: Provide delightful customer support with this multi-agent chat tool for WA
